subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, sent down in truth from the Dominion of transcendent glory, and verily they constitute God's testimony amongst His creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله نزلت بالحق من جبروت عز علیا و انها لحجه الله بین بریته
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prophecy and fulfillment
